creator: progchild@gmx.de
text:
The port "gio-fam-backend" depends on libgio, which means that it needs at least GLib 2.16. I think, this should be noted as dependency in the package.

Fix: 

Setup dependency information correctly.
How-To-Repeat: Install a version of GLib former 2.16 and try to compile the gio-fam-backend.
